public_reputation: Folk hero archer remembered for breaking a famine raid by signal-shot discipline instead of brute slaughter.
appearance: Bright-plumed road gear, polished fittings, and visible attention to presentation mark the role before the voice does.
manner: Treats planning, posture, and timing as parts of the same problem rather than separate concerns. In Zootia, that reads as someone practical, supply-aware, and season-conscious, attentive to material reliability over display, and the habits of a archers still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of archers in and around Zootia, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Zootia workable through the obligations of archers while managing the immediate pressure of institutional scrutiny in Zootia.
hidden_pressure: Must keep readiness, command cohesion, and physical security aligned even when politics or scarcity push against discipline. Around Zootia, that usually means carrying institutional scrutiny, reputation risk, daily strain without letting the role of archers visibly slip.

adventure_hooks.summary: Tessa Grainmark can pull the party into a dispute over readiness, chain of command, or blamed failure near Zootia.
Tessa Grainmark will trade useful tactical knowledge if the party solves a security problem too sensitive for ordinary channels.
Tessa Grainmark needs help hardening a position, drilling unreliable auxiliaries, or reading an approaching threat around Zootia.
Tessa Grainmark needs help with a problem in Zootia that larger systems have pushed down onto ordinary hands.

support_scope_notes: Integrated from the prior_release canon-ready named-NPC ledger append. Unsupported fields remain restrained. Appearance extended under V28_8 from role/locality/public-signal derivation rather than decorative fabrication.
public_signal: Weapon discipline, drilled stillness, and practiced readiness mark Tessa Grainmark as someone tied to organized force rather than casual violence.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Zootia: drill yards, fortifications, command posts, or exposed routes
